name: Minestrone
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup (1 lg) Potato, cut into 1-inch pieces
1/2 lb Green Beans, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart casserole, combine all ingredients.
2. Cover the dish.
3. Microwave at High for 25-35 minutes, stirring once or twice, until vegetables are tender.
